# konnect_metering_plan (Resource)

MeteringPlan Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_metering_plan" "my_meteringplan" {
  billing_cadence = "P1Y"
  currency        = "USD"
  description     = "...my_description..."
  key             = "resource_key"
  labels = {
    key = "value"
  }
  name = "...my_name..."
  phases = [
    {
      description = "...my_description..."
      duration    = "P1Y"
      key         = "resource_key"
      labels = {
        key = "value"
      }
      name = "...my_name..."
      rate_cards = [
        {
          billing_cadence = "P1Y"
          commitments = {
            maximum_amount = "...my_maximum_amount..."
            minimum_amount = "...my_minimum_amount..."
          }
          description = "...my_description..."
          discounts = {
            percentage = 44.01
            usage      = "...my_usage..."
          }
          feature = {
            id = "01G65Z755AFWAKHE12NY0CQ9FH"
          }
          key = "resource_key"
          labels = {
            key = "value"
          }
          name         = "...my_name..."
          payment_term = "in_arrears"
          price = {
            graduated = {
              tiers = [
                {
                  flat_price = {
                    amount = "...my_amount..."
                    type   = "flat"
                  }
                  unit_price = {
                    amount = "...my_amount..."
                    type   = "unit"
                  }
                  up_to_amount = "...my_up_to_amount..."
                }
              ]
              type = "graduated"
            }
          }
          tax_config = {
            behavior = "exclusive"
            code = {
              id = "01G65Z755AFWAKHE12NY0CQ9FH"
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
  pro_rating_enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `billing_cadence` (String) The billing cadence for subscriptions using this plan. Requires replacement if changed.
- `currency` (String) The currency code of the plan. Requires replacement if changed.
- `key` (String) A key is a semi-unique string that is used to identify the plan. It is used to
reference the latest `active` version of the plan and is unique with the version
number.
Requires replacement if changed.
- `name` (String) Display name of the resource.

Between 1 and 256 characters.
- `phases` (Attributes List) The plan phases define the pricing ramp for a subscription. A phase switch
occurs only at the end of a billing period. At least one phase is required. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases))

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description of the resource.

Maximum 1024 characters.
- `labels` (Map of String) Labels store metadata of an entity that can be used for filtering an entity list or for searching across entity types. 

Keys must be of length 1-63 characters, and cannot start with "kong", "konnect", "mesh", "kic", or "_".
- `pro_rating_enabled` (Boolean) Whether pro-rating is enabled for this plan. Default: true

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity creation date.
- `deleted_at` (String) An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity deletion date.
- `effective_from` (String) The date and time when the plan becomes `active`. When not specified, the plan
is in `draft` status.
- `effective_to` (String) A scheduled date and time when the plan becomes `archived`. When not specified,
the plan is in `active` status indefinitely.
- `id` (String) ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier).
- `status` (String) The status of the plan. Computed based on the effective start and end dates:

- `draft`: `effective_from` is not set.
- `scheduled`: `now < effective_from`.
- `active`: `effective_from <= now` and (`effective_to` is not set or
`now < effective_to`).
- `archived`: `effective_to <= now`.
- `updated_at` (String) An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity last update date.
- `validation_errors` (Attributes List) List of validation errors in `draft` state that prevent the plan from being
published. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--validation_errors))
- `version` (Number) Plans are versioned to allow you to make changes without affecting running
subscriptions.
Default: 1

<a id="nestedatt--phases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases`

Optional:

- `description` (String) Optional description of the resource.

Maximum 1024 characters.
- `duration` (String) The duration of the phase. When not specified, the phase runs indefinitely. Only
the last phase may omit the duration.
- `key` (String) A key is a unique string that is used to identify a resource. Not Null
- `labels` (Map of String) Labels store metadata of an entity that can be used for filtering an entity list or for searching across entity types. 

Keys must be of length 1-63 characters, and cannot start with "kong", "konnect", "mesh", "kic", or "_".
- `name` (String) Display name of the resource.

Between 1 and 256 characters.
Not Null
- `rate_cards` (Attributes List) The rate cards of the plan. Not Null (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards))

<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards`

Optional:

- `billing_cadence` (String) The billing cadence of the rate card. When null, the charge is one-time
(non-recurring). Only valid for flat prices.
- `commitments` (Attributes) Spend commitments for this rate card. Only applicable to usage-based prices
(unit, graduated, volume). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--commitments))
- `description` (String) Optional description of the resource.

Maximum 1024 characters.
- `discounts` (Attributes) The discounts of the rate card. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--discounts))
- `feature` (Attributes) The feature associated with the rate card. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--feature))
- `key` (String) A key is a unique string that is used to identify a resource. Not Null
- `labels` (Map of String) Labels store metadata of an entity that can be used for filtering an entity list or for searching across entity types. 

Keys must be of length 1-63 characters, and cannot start with "kong", "konnect", "mesh", "kic", or "_".
- `name` (String) Display name of the resource.

Between 1 and 256 characters.
Not Null
- `payment_term` (String) The payment term of the rate card. In advance payment term can only be used for
flat prices.
possible known values include one of ["in_advance", "in_arrears"]; Default: "in_arrears"
- `price` (Attributes) The price of the rate card. Not Null (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price))
- `tax_config` (Attributes) The tax config of the rate card. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--tax_config))

<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--commitments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.commitments`

Optional:

- `maximum_amount` (String) The customer is limited to spend at most the amount.
- `minimum_amount` (String) The customer is committed to spend at least the amount.


<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--discounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.discounts`

Optional:

- `percentage` (Number) Percentage discount applied to the price (0–100).
- `usage` (String) Number of usage units granted free before billing starts. Only applies to
usage-based lines (not flat fees). Usage is treated as zero until this amount is
exhausted.


<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--feature"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.feature`

Optional:

- `id` (String) ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier). Not Null


<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price`

Optional:

- `flat` (Attributes) Flat price. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--flat))
- `free` (Attributes) Free price. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--free))
- `graduated` (Attributes) Graduated tiered price.

Each tier's rate applies only to the usage within that tier. Pricing can change
as cumulative usage crosses tier boundaries.

When UnitConfig is present on the rate card, tier boundaries (up_to_amount) are
expressed in converted billing units. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--graduated))
- `unit` (Attributes) Unit price.

Charges a fixed rate per billing unit. When UnitConfig is present on the rate
card, billing units are the converted quantities (e.g. GB instead of bytes). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--unit))
- `volume` (Attributes) Volume tiered price.

The maximum quantity within a period determines the per-unit price for all units
in that period.

When UnitConfig is present on the rate card, tier boundaries (up_to_amount) are
expressed in converted billing units. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--volume))

<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--flat"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.flat`

Optional:

- `amount` (String) The amount of the flat price. Not Null
- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "flat"


<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--free"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.free`

Optional:

- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "free"


<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--graduated"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.graduated`

Optional:

- `tiers` (Attributes List) The tiers of the graduated price. At least one tier is required. Not Null (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--graduated--tiers))
- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "graduated"

<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--graduated--tiers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.graduated.tiers`

Optional:

- `flat_price` (Attributes) The flat price component of the tier. Charged once when the tier is entered. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--graduated--tiers--flat_price))
- `unit_price` (Attributes) The unit price component of the tier. Charged per billing unit within the tier. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--graduated--tiers--unit_price))
- `up_to_amount` (String) Up to and including this quantity will be contained in the tier. If undefined,
the tier is open-ended (the last tier).

<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--graduated--tiers--flat_price"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.graduated.tiers.flat_price`

Optional:

- `amount` (String) The amount of the flat price. Not Null
- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "flat"


<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--graduated--tiers--unit_price"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.graduated.tiers.unit_price`

Optional:

- `amount` (String) The amount of the unit price. Not Null
- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "unit"




<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--unit"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.unit`

Optional:

- `amount` (String) The amount of the unit price. Not Null
- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "unit"


<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--volume"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.volume`

Optional:

- `tiers` (Attributes List) The tiers of the volume price. At least one tier is required. Not Null (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--volume--tiers))
- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "volume"

<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--volume--tiers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.volume.tiers`

Optional:

- `flat_price` (Attributes) The flat price component of the tier. Charged once when the tier is entered. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--volume--tiers--flat_price))
- `unit_price` (Attributes) The unit price component of the tier. Charged per billing unit within the tier. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--volume--tiers--unit_price))
- `up_to_amount` (String) Up to and including this quantity will be contained in the tier. If undefined,
the tier is open-ended (the last tier).

<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--volume--tiers--flat_price"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.volume.tiers.flat_price`

Optional:

- `amount` (String) The amount of the flat price. Not Null
- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "flat"


<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--price--volume--tiers--unit_price"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.price.volume.tiers.unit_price`

Optional:

- `amount` (String) The amount of the unit price. Not Null
- `type` (String) The type of the price. Not Null; must be "unit"





<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--tax_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.tax_config`

Optional:

- `behavior` (String) Tax behavior.

This enum is used to specify whether tax is included in the price or excluded
from the price.
possible known values include one of ["inclusive", "exclusive"]
- `code` (Attributes) TaxCode reference. Not Null (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--tax_config--code))

<a id="nestedatt--phases--rate_cards--tax_config--code"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.rate_cards.tax_config.code`

Optional:

- `id` (String) ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier). Not Null





<a id="nestedatt--validation_errors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `validation_errors`

Read-Only:

- `attributes` (Map of String) Additional structured context.
- `code` (String) Machine-readable error code.
- `field` (String) The path to the field.
- `message` (String) Human-readable description of the error.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect_metering_plan.my_konnect_metering_plan
  id = "01G65Z755AFWAKHE12NY0CQ9FH"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect_metering_plan.my_konnect_metering_plan "01G65Z755AFWAKHE12NY0CQ9FH"
```
